meaning: vi.繁荣,茂盛,活跃,手舞足蹈,兴旺,处于旺盛时期vt.挥动,夸耀n.茂盛,兴旺,华饰,繁荣
examples: These plants flourish in a damp climate.
He opened the door for her with a flourish.
Keep the soil moist. That way, the seedling will flourish.
Emerging from the main buildings, outdoor xeriscaped gardens flourish with more than 30, 000 plants.
To mutually align ourselves with these goals is the only way a business can truly flourish.
